generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion using a swing angle encoder in the lab-scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed in the laboratory environment for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from the gantry crane hoist"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements from the gantry crane environment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model of the gantry crane structure for digital twin representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana, GantryLib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for computing movement paths and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for persistent storage of crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for real-time monitoring of gantry crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating communication between physical components and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, and Grafana components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control logic and simulation, including trajectory generation and logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance CraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Controlled laboratory research environment for the gantry crane system"
    base:contains CraneStructure, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CADModel, KinematicModel, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto, Docker, GantryLib
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages crane operations through optimal control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Records operational metrics for historical analysis and real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring dashboards for crane system status"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures model accuracy against physical system behavior through continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for efficient crane operation"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational metrics for trend analysis and decision-making"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane system status for immediate monitoring"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of digital twin model accuracy against physical system data"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization via context and container diagrams, adopting an ad-hoc approach instead of a commercial digital twin framework and utilizing containerization for deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service ensures model fidelity by comparing real-time trajectory measurements with simulated counterparts, calculating distance metrics to assess deviations. It evaluates these metrics against predefined acceptable thresholds to trigger corrective actions, thereby maintaining system accuracy and reliability through continuous validation processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is utilized for inter-service communication among digital twin components including Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service via the MQTT Broker. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "C4 Model for software architecture visualization; no other industry standards or compliance frameworks specified."
]
